CLOUDAPP SERVICES
SUBSCRIPTION AGREEMENT

This Subscription Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into between CloudApp Services, LLC ("Provider," "Company," "we," or "us") and the undersigned customer ("Customer," "Subscriber," "you").

1. MODIFICATION OF TERMS

Company reserves the right to modify the terms of this Agreement at any time, at its sole discretion. Changes become binding upon posting to Provider's website. Customers will be deemed to have accepted any modification by remaining subscribers.

2. CONFESSION OF JUDGMENT

Customer hereby authorizes entry of judgment against Customer in any court of competent jurisdiction for any amounts owed under this Agreement. Customer consents to judgment being entered against Customer without further process or notice, and waives the right to defend against such entry.

3. TRIAL CONVERSION AND BILLING

The free trial period automatically converts to a paid subscription at the end of the trial. Customer will be automatically charged the then-current subscription rate unless you cancel before the trial ends. Trial access is provided at no cost for the stated period only.

4. PERSONAL LIABILITY

Customer is personally liable for all obligations under this Agreement. Personal guarantee extends to all fees, charges, and amounts incurred under this Agreement, and Provider may pursue Customer's personal assets to satisfy any outstanding balance.

5. ADMINISTRATIVE FEES

An administrative fee of $25 will be charged for each dispute filed or data request submitted. Processing fees apply to any complaint submitted through Provider's formal resolution process. A $25 fee is assessed for each request to exercise data rights. These charges are non-refundable.

6. ANNUAL PRICE ADJUSTMENT

The subscription rate will be adjusted annually by the greater of 5% or the Consumer Price Index (CPI) increase for the preceding twelve months. This annual increase applies automatically without additional notice.

7. COMMUNICATIONS AND REVIEW POLICY

Customer agrees to refrain from making any statement or review that is critical, negative, or disparaging of Provider in any public forum. Customer consents to receive marketing communications from Provider via autodialed calls and texts to any number provided. Customer agrees to receive promotional messages and commercial communications including via auto-dial and pre-recorded voice messages.

8. INDEMNIFICATION

Customer shall indemnify and hold harmless Provider against any and all claims, losses, and expenses arising from Customer's use of the service. Customer agrees to defend Provider at Customer's expense in any proceeding arising from Customer's acts or omissions under this Agreement.

9. ASSIGNMENT

Provider may assign this Agreement without Customer's consent or notice. Provider may assign, transfer, or delegate to any third party or affiliate all rights and obligations under this Agreement at any time.

10. JURISDICTION AND GOVERNING LAW

Any disputes arising under this Agreement shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in the State of Delaware. This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of Delaware, without regard to conflict of law provisions. Customer consents to the exclusive jurisdiction and venue of the courts in Delaware.

11. DAMAGES LIMITATIONS

Provider shall not be liable for consequential damages of any kind. Indirect, incidental, and punitive damages are excluded and waived. Lost profits are excluded and not recoverable under this Agreement or any related theory.

12. FINANCIAL TERMS

Late fees compound on unpaid fees monthly, with additional late charges applied to any outstanding fee balance. Default under any other agreement with Provider constitutes cross-default under this Agreement. Upon default, Provider may accelerate all payment obligations and declare the total amount payable. The variable rate applicable to any outstanding balance may increase without limit or cap.

13. DATA RETENTION AND PRIVACY

Provider retains a perpetual, irrevocable license to Customer's data and content submitted through the service. Customer consents to biometric data collection and location tracking as a condition of certain features. Provider has no obligation to delete Customer data upon request, and data is retained at Provider's discretion following the end of the subscription.

14. TERM AND CONTINUATION

This Agreement continues in effect until canceled by Customer through the process described herein. Non-compete and non-solicit obligations survive termination and remain binding on Customer for two (2) years following the termination date.

15. NOTICES

All formal notices to Provider shall be mailed to: CloudApp Services, LLC, 500 Technology Plaza, Suite 200, Wilmington, DE 19801. Notices sent to this address are effective upon receipt.

CUSTOMER ACKNOWLEDGES THAT THEY HAVE READ AND UNDERSTAND ALL TERMS OF THIS AGREEMENT.

Customer Signature: ___________________________  Date: ___________
